name: OLMo 3 7B
note: Lighter-weight member of the OLMo 3 family (Base/Think/Instruct) built on the Dolma 3 / Dolci stack; runs on a wider range of hardware.

results.notes: OLMo 3 technical report (arXiv 2512.13961) confirms this is BFCLv3 (Patil et al. 2025), run via the official Gorilla repository

GPQA Diamond, measured by Artificial Analysis (Intelligence Index v4), republished on the fetched page. Ai2's own self-reported GPQA on the HF card/paper is 40.4, but per the OLMo 3 technical report this uses the gpqa_main split (via olmes), not Diamond, so the independent Diamond figure is used for this Diamond-scoped slug (consistent with how OLMo 3-Think 32B is handled in this corpus)
Humanity's Last Exam, no tools; Artificial Analysis measurement, republished on the fetched page; not reported by Ai2 on the Instruct 7B card
Artificial Analysis measurement, republished on the fetched page; Ai2 only reports MMLU-Pro for OLMo 3 base models (OlmoBaseEval), not the Instruct 7B post-trained model

verificationNotes: Existence confirmed: official Ai2 blog (allenai.org/blog/olmo3) and multiple press (MarkTechPost, GeekWire, InfoQ) confirm Nov 20, 2025 release. paramsB re-derived from allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B model.safetensors.index.json: 7,298,011,136 params = 7.30B (exact match). config.json confirms max_position_embeddings=65536 (~64K, matches ctxK) and hybrid sliding-window/full-attention architecture (32 layers). License Apache 2.0 and function-calling system-message confirmed on the allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct model card. All 7 benchmark rows (MATH 87.3, AIME2024 44.3, BBH 71.2, HumanEvalPlus 77.2, IFEval 85.6, MMLU 69.1, LiveCodeBench v3 29.5) were literally confirmed present on the cited HF model card.
